titles.title: I'd Like to Talk It Over

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some morning when I stand in God's wonderful city Where the light of Heaven's glory Will never grow dim And I shake hands with the Savior Who gave me life eternal I'd like to talk it over with Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'd like to kneel down And talk it all over with Him I'd like to say, "Lord, You loved me when my path was so dim." I cannot repay Him when I meet Him in that city above But I'd like to talk it over And thank Him for His wonderful love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We'll be singing hallelujahs forever and ever For we're told the cup of gladness He'll fill to the brim But I know that I have brought Him Some deep tears of sorrow And I'd like to talk it over with Him
